card_header.title: Set Availability
card_header.description: Block dates for maintenance or open up rooms for new bookings.

rooms.label: Specific Rooms (Optional)
rooms.description: Leave this blank to apply the rule to all rooms of the selected type.
rooms.edit_description: Editing applies to the original selection (room or type). To change scope, create a new rule.

date_range.label: Date Range
date_range.placeholder: Pick a start and end date
date_range.open_ended_checkbox: This is an open-ended block (no end date)
date_range.open_ended_tooltip: Useful for long-term maintenance. The block will extend indefinitely until removed.
date_range.end_date_required: End date is required unless 'Open-ended' is checked.

alert.title: Important Note
alert.description: Setting a room type to 'Available' will override any individual room blocks within it for the selected period. Blocking will always take precedence over availability.

confirmation.title: Confirm Availability Change
confirmation.description: Please review the changes below before confirming. This action will override existing settings for the selected dates.
confirmation.alert_title_block: You are about to BLOCK these rooms.
confirmation.alert_description_block: This will make them unavailable for booking on the specified dates.
confirmation.alert_title_available: You are about to MAKE these rooms available.
confirmation.alert_description_available: This will allow them to be booked on the specified dates.

log.title: Recent Availability Updates
log.description: A log of the last 50 manual availability or block settings applied.

log_table.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this availability setting?

toasts.log_load_error_description: Could not fetch recent availability updates.
toasts.delete_success_description: The availability setting has been removed.
toasts.delete_error_description: Could not delete the setting. Please try again.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to manage availability. Please contact an administrator.
